rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARTHUR F. GLOSTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 27, 2019. an amendment to the petition was filed august 6, 2019 and noticed for august 13. an amendment requires the same notice (15 days) as the petition it amends. new notice must be mailed no later than august 12, 2019, for the continued hearing date and new POS filed. the POS must be filed and a file stamped hard copy of the amendment and revised order must be delivered to the examiner in room 202 no later than noon on tuesday, august 20, 2019, in order to avoid an automatic continuance.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE 2016 RICHARD G. FABIAN CHARITABLE REMAINDER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Of Division Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/3/19: 1. The Attorney General and Stephen Holtzmann must receive or waive proper notice. Please contact examiner for a longer continuance if 30 days' notice will be required. 2. In a Supplement to Petition, signed and verified by Petitioner, please address whether Division 9 of the Probate Code (Sections 15000, et seq.) is in conflict with the Uniform Supervision of Trustees for Charitable Purposes Act (Prob. C. Section 15004). Endorsed-filed copies of all documents must be received in Room 202 by 8/27/19.
